utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each one in the final package: (1) destination – fully specified with city and country ✅; (2) travel_dates – specific dates given ✅; (3) transportation – includes type, details, cost, and currency ✅; (4) accommodation – includes name, type, room_type, meal_plan, nights, cost, and currency ✅; (5) activities – includes name, type, child_friendly, cost, and currency ✅; (6) additional_services – includes list of services, cost, and currency ✅; (7) total_budget – includes total cost, currency, and breakdown ✅. All seven are fully specified with necessary details.
